name: Cantaloupe Cooler Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 large Onion, thinly sliced and separated into rings
1/2 lb Bacon, cooked and crumbled (about 12 slices)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel cantaloupe and cut into bite-size pieces.
2. Arrange the pieces on lettuce leaves.
3. Top cantaloupe with onion and crumbled bacon.
4. Drizzle dressing over salad.
BLENDER POPPY SEED DRESSING:
1. Combine all ingredients in a container of an electric blender.
2. Process on low speed for 30 seconds.
3. Chill thoroughly.
4. Stir well before serving.
Yield: 1-1/4 cups.
